title: Juniper essential oil (North Macedonia)
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is NMK. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 01 NMK. There is not a consolidated VC on this product.

title: Mountain landscape and reference chains
description: The reference mountain chain of this VC is Mountain Meleshevija. The reference mountain landscape of this VC is unspecified. Maleshevski mountains are located in the eastern part of the Republic of North Macedonia. The are covers the municipalities of Berovo and Pehchevo, and is characterized with the natural and cultural wealth. Two rivers cross the region, Bregalnica and Strumica. Forests covers 52% of the Maleshevija region, while pastures around 20%.

title: Interest on this VC
description: High quality products, which are produced in a very cleaned environment, such as Maleshevija. Being products with rare values.

title: Challenges
description: Production of Juniper essential oil is very variable and depends mainly on climate change. Chemicals used sometimes wrongly and needlessly. Currently, there is not a consolidated VC for this product. Overall the type of challenge faced by this VC is Current and Predicted. This VC is classified as Traditional.

title: Innovation
description: The type of innovation of this VC (Value Chain) is unspecified. Juniper essential oil is used in different final innovative products. The innovation is related to the whole VC. The land use systems involved are Forestry and Natural land. The local assets include Social and cultural.
